items.name: Elton John - Tour Suit
items.description:
Feel like a million dollars in this expertly crafted, incredibly detailed suit made by UGC Creator @Soulskor in homage to the suits Elton John has worn on the Farewell Yellow Brick Road Tour. 

The suit comes with an Elton John Avatar Bundle and the look is completed with the Elton John Eyewear frames by @RynityRift and a pair of designer shoes.

All items can be removed from the Avatar body so that you can mix and match to create a style all your own.
